stages.concept:
# Unit 135: 관계부사 when, where - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **관계부사 when, where**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: 관계부사는 **전치사 + 관계대명사**를 대신해요. 선행사가 **시간/장소**일 때 써요.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **when** — 선행사가 **시간** (= at/on/in which)

> I remember the day **when** we first met.
> 나는 우리가 처음 만난 날을 기억한다.
> = I remember the day **on which** we first met.

> Summer is the season **when** it rains a lot.
> 여름은 비가 많이 오는 계절이다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **where** — 선행사가 **장소** (= at/in/on which)

> This is the house **where** I was born.
> 이것은 내가 태어난 집이다.
> = This is the house **in which** I was born.

> The park **where** we played is gone.
> 우리가 놀았던 공원이 없어졌다.

👩‍🏫 선생님: 관계부사 vs 관계대명사:

> The day **when** I arrived (관계부사 — 부사 역할)
> The day **that/which** I remember (관계대명사 — 목적어 역할)

**Q. 다음 빈칸에 알맞은 단어를 고르세요.**
"Do you know the restaurant (       ) they serve delicious pizza?"
1. which
2. where ✅
3. when

👩‍🏫 선생님: 맞아요. 선행사가 장소(the restaurant)이고, 뒤에 이어지는 문장(they serve delicious pizza)이 완전한 형태이므로, 장소를 나타내는 관계부사 where가 와야 합니다!

🧑‍🎓 학생: 시간 선행사 → when, 장소 선행사 → where! 전치사 + which로 바꿀 수 있다는 것도 기억!
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 135: 관계부사 when, where - 연습문제 A

**01.** 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I'm looking for a house (     ) I can live with my dog.
> **정답** where

---

**02.** I remember the day ? we first met.
> **정답** when

---

**03.** This is the park ? we played yesterday.
> **정답** where

---

**04.** Summer is the season ? I like most.
> **정답** when

---

**05.** The school ? I study is near my house.
> **정답** where

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
This is the place when I was born.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** when → where

---

**07.** I remember the day where we graduated.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** where → when

---

**08.** This is the café when I study.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** when → where

---

**09.** Spring is the season where flowers bloom.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** where → when

---

**10.** The library when I go is big.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** when → where

---

**11.** 두 문장을 관계부사를 사용하여 한 문장으로 만드시오.
I visited the city. I was born there.
> **정답** I visited the city where I was born.

---

**12.** I remember the year. We moved to Seoul then.
> **정답** I remember the year when we moved to Seoul.

---

**13.** This is the school. She studies there.
> **정답** This is the school where she studies.

---

**14.** I will never forget the day. I won the prize then.
> **정답** I will never forget the day when I won the prize.

---

**15.** The park is big. We played there.
> **정답** The park where we played is big.

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
이곳은 내가 태어난 도시이다.
This the is city where I was born
> **정답** This / is / the / city / where / I / was / born

---

**17.** 나는 우리가 처음 만난 날을 기억한다.
remember I the day when we first met
> **정답** I / remember / the / day / when / we / first / met

---

**18.** 이것은 그녀가 공부하는 도서관이다.
This the is library where she studies
> **정답** This / is / the / library / where / she / studies

---

**19.** 여름은 내가 가장 좋아하는 계절이다.
Summer the is season when I like most
> **정답** Summer / is / the / season / when / I / like / most

---

**20.** 우리가 놀았던 공원은 크다.
The park where played we is big
> **정답** The / park / where / we / played / is / big
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 135: 관계부사 when, where - 연습문제 B

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I joined a website ________ I can buy a computer.
when
why
what
where
> **정답** where

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Do you know the time _______ the bookstore closes?
where
when
which
what
> **정답** when

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I decided ________ where I would meet him.
the place
the day
the reason
the time
> **정답** the place

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I'm looking forward to _______ when she invites me.
the way
the day
the place
the reason
> **정답** the day

---

**05.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Do you know the time when the train will
leave?
She'll go to the bookstore in where I went to
yesterday.
I went to the house where she lived.
Today is the day when my old friend visits me.
> **정답** She'll go to the bookstore in where I went to
yesterday.

---

**06.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I didn't remember the person who I met.
Jeju Island is a place where many tourists
want to travel.
Christmas is the day which Jesus was born.
He enjoyed the candy that I gave him.
> **정답** Christmas is the day which Jesus was born.

---

**07.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I can't forget the day when I participated in
the festival.
I visited the cafe where I saw him yesterday
again.
The gym is the place which many people
exercise.
Autumn is the time when leaves fall.
> **정답** The gym is the place which many people exercise.

---

**08.** 다음 중 주어진 문장과 의미가 같도록 바르게 고친 것을
고르시오. [2개]
This is the building where he works.
This is the building in which he works.
This is the building in where he works.
This is the building which he works in.
This is the building in that he works.
> **정답** This is the building in which he works., This is the
building which he works in.

---

**09.** 다음 중 주어진 문장과 의미가 같도록 고칠 때, 어법상
틀린 것을 고르시오.
Sunday is the day I go on a trip.
Sunday is the day on which I go on a trip.
Sunday is the day when I go on a trip.
Sunday is the day on that I go on a trip.
Sunday is the day which I go on a trip on.
> **정답** Sunday is the day on that I go on a trip.

---

**10.** 다음 중 빈칸에 들어갈 관계부사가 나머지와 다른 하나를
고르시오.
Monday is the day ________ I practice soccer.
This is a cafe _______ people eat dessert.
This country has a lot of land _______ farmers
farm.
This school is the place _______ baseball
games were held last year.
> **정답** Monday is the day ________ I practice soccer.

---

**11.** 다음 중 빈칸에 들어갈 관계부사가 나머지와 다른 하나를
고르시오.
I remember the place _______ I was born.
She checked the time _______ she meet them
at.
January 1st is the day _______ I made a New
Year's resolution.
I missed the moment _______ the player
kicked the ball.
> **정답** I remember the place _______ I was born.

---

**12.** 다음 중 where의 쓰임이 나머지와 다른 하나를 고르시오.
This is the house where my dog will live.
I asked her where I should go.
Korea is one of the countries where the four
seasons are distinct.
This is the place where she met him.
> **정답** I asked her where I should go.

---

**13.** 다음 중 when의 쓰임이 나머지와 다른 하나를 고르시오.
That's the first day when I bought a cell
phone.
They missed the time when they lived with the
dog.
I wonder when they will leave for New York.
The day when I met him was a snowy day.
> **정답** I wonder when they will leave for New York.

---

**14.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 바르게 연결한 것을 고르시오.
[2개]
Do you know the place?
I can book a ticket there.
Do you know the place when I can book a
ticket?
Do you know the place in which I can book a
ticket?
Do you know the place which I can book a
ticket?
Do you know the place where I can book a
ticket?
> **정답** Do you know the place in which I can book a ticket?,
Do you know the place where I can book a ticket?

---

**15.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 바르게 연결한 것을 고르시오.
[2개]
That's the time.
I send her a message at that time.
That's the time at which I send her a message.
That's the time when I send her a message.
That's the time which I send her a message.
That's the time at that I send her a message.
> **정답** That's the time when I send her a message., That's
the time at which I send her a message.

---

**16.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때, 바르지 못한 것을
고르시오.
I stayed at the hotel.
This hotel is famous.
The hotel where I stayed is famous.
The hotel at which I stayed is famous.
The hotel that I stayed at is famous.
The hotel at that I stayed is famous.
> **정답** The hotel at that I stayed is famous.

---

**17.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때, 바르지 못한 것을
고르시오.
I remember the day.
I met my best friend on that day.
I remember the day when I met my best
friend.
I remember the day when I met my best friend
on that day.
I remember the day I met my best friend on.
I remember the day on which I met my best
friend.
> **정답** I remember the day when I met my best friend on
that day.

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
This park is the place which
she lost her wallet.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** which → where (in which)

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I like the time where the
sun rises.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** where → when

---

**20.** 다음 글에서 틀린 부분을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
I arrived in this village yesterday. This is that I
lived when I was young. I miss the days
where I was in elementary school.
At that time, I made many
friends.
> **정답** where, when, when, At that time
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 135 관계부사 when, where중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** 다음 두 문장을 관계부사를 사용하여 한 문장으로
만드시오.
This is the library.
Clara goes to the library every Sunday.
This is  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  every
week.
정답 the, library, where, Clara, goes

---

**02.** 다음 두 문장을 관계부사를 사용하여 한 문장으로
만드시오.
That was the year.
I entered the middle school then.
That was  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
  (     )   (     ) .
정답 the, year, when, I, entered, the, middle, school

---

**03.** 다음 두 문장을 관계부사를 사용하여 한 문장으로
만드시오.
March 5th is the day.
I was born on that day.
March 5th is  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  
.
정답 the, day, when, I, was, born

---

**04.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
이곳은 자동차가 만들어지는 공장이다. [cars, be made]
This is a factory  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 where, cars, are, made

---

**05.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
나는 그가 숨어있는 장소를 찾았다. [be hiding]
I found a place  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
정답 where, he, was, hiding

---

**06.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 표현을 이용하여 문장을
완성하시오.
네가 숙제를 제출하는 날을 확인해라. [submit, your
homework]
Check the day  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) .
• submit 제출하다
정답 when, you, submit, your, homework

---

**07.** 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
I miss the camp when I saw many stars.
→ I miss the camp  (     )  I saw many stars.
정답 where (in which)

---

**08.** 다음 문장에서 어법상 틀린 부분을 찾아 고쳐 쓰시오.
He likes the day which there is a P.E. class.
→ He likes the day  (     )  there is a P.E. class.
정답 when (on which)

---

**09.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 단어를 알맞게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
1월1일은 그가 미국으로 떠난 날이다.
[is] [left] [January 1st]
[when] [where]
[for the United States.] [he]
[the day]
정답 January 1st / is / the day / when / he / left / for the
United States.

---

**10.** 우리말에 맞게 주어진 단어를 알맞게 배열하여 문장을
완성하시오.
내가 자란 시골은 조용하고 평화롭다.
[where] [when] [is] (     ) I
[quiet and peaceful.]
[The countryside] [grew up]
정답 The countryside / where / I / grew up / is / quiet and
peaceful.

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 135: 관계부사 when, where - 변형문제

**01.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I visited a store ________ I can buy art supplies. when why what where
> 정답: where

---

**02.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
Do you know the time _______ the library opens? where when which what
> 정답: when

---

**03.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I decided ________ where I would study. the place the day the reason the time
> 정답: the place

---

**04.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
I'm looking forward to _______ when she visits me. the way the day the place the reason
> 정답: the day

---

**05.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Do you know the time when the bus will arrive?
She'll go to the park in where I went to yesterday.
I went to the café where she worked.
Today is the day when my old classmate visits me.
> 정답: She'll go to the park in where I went to

---

**06.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I didn't remember the person who I met.
The aquarium is a place where many children want to visit.
New Year's Day is the day which people celebrate.
He enjoyed the candy that I shared with him.
> 정답: New Year's Day is the day which people celebrate.

---

**07.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
I can't forget the day when I performed on stage.
I visited the bakery where I saw her yesterday again.
The stadium is the place which many fans gather.
Spring is the time when flowers bloom.
> 정답: The stadium is the place which many fans gather.

---

**08.** 다음 중 주어진 문장과 의미가 같도록 바르게 고친 것을 고르시오. [2개]
This is the school where he studies.
This is the school in which he studies.
This is the school in where he studies.
This is the school which he studies in.
This is the school in that he studies.
> 정답: This is the school in which he studies., This is the

---

**09.** 다음 중 주어진 문장과 의미가 같도록 고칠 때, 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
Saturday is the day I go on a hike.
Saturday is the day on which I go on a hike.
Saturday is the day when I go on a hike.
Saturday is the day on that I go on a hike.
Saturday is the day which I go on a hike on.
> 정답: Saturday is the day on that I go on a hike.

---

**10.** 다음 중 빈칸에 들어갈 관계부사가 나머지와 다른 하나를 고르시오.
Tuesday is the day ________ I practice piano.
This is a studio _______ people record music.
This country has a lot of coastline _______ fishermen work.
This gym is the place _______ volleyball matches were held last year.
> 정답: Tuesday is the day ________ I practice piano.

---

**11.** 다음 중 빈칸에 들어갈 관계부사가 나머지와 다른 하나를 고르시오.
I remember the village _______ I grew up.
She checked the time _______ she should meet him.
March 1st is the day _______ I started my new job.
I missed the moment _______ the singer walked on stage.
> 정답: I remember the village _______ I grew up.

---

**12.** 다음 중 where의 쓰임이 나머지와 다른 하나를 고르시오.
This is the room where my cat sleeps.
I asked her where I should sit.
Tokyo is one of the cities where many tourists want to explore.
This is the bench where she found the wallet.
> 정답: I asked her where I should sit.

---

**13.** 다음 중 when의 쓰임이 나머지와 다른 하나를 고르시오.
That's the first time when I ate sushi.
They missed the period when they lived with the old dog.
I wonder when they will arrive at the airport.
The evening when I met her was a rainy evening.
> 정답: I wonder when they will arrive at the airport.

---

**14.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 바르게 연결한 것을 고르시오. [2개]
Do you know the shop?
I can buy a guitar there.
Do you know the shop when I can buy a guitar?
Do you know the shop in which I can buy a guitar?
Do you know the shop which I can buy a guitar?
Do you know the shop where I can buy a guitar?
> 정답: Do you know the shop in which I can buy a guitar?,

---

**15.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 바르게 연결한 것을 고르시오. [2개]
That's the hour.
I send her a text at that hour.
That's the hour at which I send her a text.
That's the hour when I send her a text.
That's the hour which I send her a text.
That's the hour at that I send her a text.
> 정답: That's the hour when I send her a text., That's

---

**16.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때, 바르지 못한 것을 고르시오.
I stayed at the hostel.
This hostel is affordable.
The hostel where I stayed is affordable.
The hostel at which I stayed is affordable.
The hostel that I stayed at is affordable.
The hostel at that I stayed is affordable.
> 정답: The hostel at that I stayed is affordable.

---

**17.** 다음 두 문장을 한 문장으로 연결할 때, 바르지 못한 것을 고르시오.
